redacted_by_govfolio: 2026-07-06 (orchestrator, before commit): NR_CPF_CANDIDATO, DT_NASCIMENTO, and NR_TITULO_ELEITORAL_CANDIDATO values replaced with [REDACTED-BY-GOVFOLIO-*] placeholders in the archived CSV. These are real, live PII (Brazilian national taxpayer ID, birth date, voter-registration number) for real named 2022 candidates, sourced from TSE's own public bulk open-data export; the source file and URL are genuinely public, but this project does not need to perpetuate a permanent, easily-discoverable copy of those specific values in its own git history to support the survey's claim (which is about column/field presence and format, not the individual values). The original unredacted bytes were never committed. See docs/regimes/br/AUTHORITY.md personal_data_to_redact and agents/skills/evidence-archiving/SKILL.md.
